items.title: Why Today (Dec. 18) Is a Big Day for the Stock Market
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The Federal Reserve is expected to cut interest rates by a quarter-point at its upcoming meeting, but the stock market may tumble if officials signal fewer rate cuts than expected. The economy and labor market are stronger than anticipated, and inflation has reaccelerated, which could lead the Fed to revise its long-term economic projections.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Goldman Sachs expects three quarter-point interest rate cuts by March 2025, which is more optimistic than the market's expectations.
